text:
payments are calculated as the 
sum of NCH_BENE_IP_DDCTBL_AMT and NCH_BENE_PTA_COINSRNC_LBLTY_AM for all relevant claims 
where the CLM_PMT_AMT >= 0. 

These OIP claims are a subset of the claims in the IP data file consisting of data from IP settings such as 
long-term care hospitals, inpatient psychiatric facilities, inpatient rehabilitation facilities, and other types 
of IP facilities such as children’s hospitals or cancer centers. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: OIP_BENE_PMT 

TYPE: NUM
